/usr/bin/ar qc libjme.a CMakeFiles/jme.dir/src/api.c.o CMakeFiles/jme.dir/src/angle.c.o CMakeFiles/jme.dir/src/astrometry.c.o CMakeFiles/jme.dir/src/calc.c.o CMakeFiles/jme.dir/src/context.c.o CMakeFiles/jme.dir/src/coordinates.c.o CMakeFiles/jme.dir/src/events.c.o CMakeFiles/jme.dir/src/fixstar.c.o CMakeFiles/jme.dir/src/houses.c.o CMakeFiles/jme.dir/src/julian.c.o CMakeFiles/jme.dir/src/jpl.c.o CMakeFiles/jme.dir/src/metadata.c.o CMakeFiles/jme.dir/src/sidereal.c.o CMakeFiles/jme.dir/src/time.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libjme.a
